titleStmt.title: SII 9.216: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 216. (A.R. No. 244 of 1918.) ON A BROKEN SLAB LYING NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE IN KUNCHURU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: The stone is mutilated and a part of the record including the date is lost. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva is stated to have been ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwothousand. It mentions the Mahānāḷprabhu Iruṅgararasa of Koṁchāpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya vē . namastāmrajaṭājāḷabāḷapallavaśālinē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bha śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭāraka
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ . cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yadvaṁśāṁ
baradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ paricchēdigaṁḍa rā
jigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ tri
bhuvanamallapāṁḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍimūvattirccāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahānāḷprabhu
koṁcāpurada yiruṁgararasana vīravitaraṇamāhēsvarikeya mahimāspadamenteṁ
doḍe . Uragēṁdrāmritatuṁgapiṁgaḷajaṭākōṭīrabhāraṁ dharādharaputrīmukhapadmasū
ryyananaghaṁ dēvēṁdramauḷiparaṟpuritānargghyamaṇiprabhōllasitapādāṁbhōruhaṁ niṭi
garasēṁgigabhivriddhiyaṁ nirupamaṁ maṁdākinīvallabhaṁ
gi suddhacaritrage vipulēṁ
Digital edition of SII 9.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
